name: research
description: Research pack: arxiv-ai-researcher (AI/ML paper discovery & synthesis), gemini-api-researcher (Gemini API capabilities & usage), huggingface-spaces-researcher (HF Spaces/model discovery), and verify-subagent-result (cross-validation of mid-confidence subagent findings). Role-agnostic research tooling for anyone investigating AI/ML papers, APIs, and models.
